headline: Nasdaq plunges 1,100 points over renewed rate hike concerns
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) sink in Friday trading, the Nasdaq Composite leading losses and closing over 1,100 points lower (4.18%). The market is reacting to May's overwhelmingly positive labor data — 172,000 jobs added the US economy vs. estimates of 88,000 — raising investor concerns that the Federal Reserve may be inclined to hike interest rates. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre breaks down the day's biggest market moves.

content.title: Nasdaq plunges 1,100 points over renewed rate hike concerns
content.description:
US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) sink in Friday trading, the Nasdaq Composite leading losses and closing over 1,100 points lower (4.18%). The market is reacting to May's overwhelmingly positive labor data — 172,000 jobs added the US economy vs. estimates of 88,000 — raising investor concerns that the Federal Reserve may be inclined to hike interest rates.

Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre breaks down the day's biggest market moves.
content.summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) sink in Friday trading, the Nasdaq Composite leading losses and closing over 1,100 points lower (4.18%). The market is reacting to May's overwhelmingly positive labor data — 172,000 jobs added the US economy vs. estimates of 88,000 — raising investor concerns that the Federal Reserve may be inclined to hike interest rates. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre breaks down the day's biggest market moves.

headline: Markets News: June 5, 2026: Nasdaq Ends Day 4% Lower, Tech Stocks Plunge; S&P 500 Snaps 9-Week Winning Streak; Treasury Yields Rise; Bitcoin Drops Below $60,000
summary: Major stock indexes plunged Friday, with the Nasdaq closing 4% lower, as technology shares dropped for a second straight day. Meanwhile, Treasury yields surged after the monthly U.S. employment report indicated more jobs were added than expected in May.

content.title: Markets News: June 5, 2026: Nasdaq Ends Day 4% Lower, Tech Stocks Plunge; S&P 500 Snaps 9-Week Winning Streak; Treasury Yields Rise; Bitcoin Drops Below $60,000
content.summary: Major stock indexes plunged Friday, with the Nasdaq closing 4% lower, as technology shares dropped for a second straight day. Meanwhile, Treasury yields surged after the monthly U.S. employment report indicated more jobs were added than expected in May.
